user_query:
Our Azure bandwidth and egress costs have spiked over the last quarter. Please analyze our exports and propose concrete savings. Read these files under input/:
- input/cost_bandwidth.csv (Azure Cost Management export filtered to the Bandwidth service for last month)
- input/usage_network.json (Azure consumption usage JSON subset for networking)
- input/topology_vnets_private_endpoints.json (current VNet and Private Endpoint inventory)

Deliverables:
1) Write a structured analysis to output/analysis.json with exactly these top-level keys:
   - "source_files": an array listing the exact input file paths you read
   - "bandwidth_breakdown": an array of objects with fields {"type": "inter-region" | "internet_egress" | "private_link" | "other", "monthly_cost": number, "percent_of_total": number}
   - "region_egress": an array of objects with fields {"region": string, "egress_cost": number}
   - "opportunities": an array of objects with fields {"category": "CDN" | "Front Door" | "Private Endpoint" | "Lifecycle Policy", "description": string, "est_offload_pct": number | null, "est_savings_pct": number | null}
   - "roi_table": an array of objects with fields {"change": string, "effort": "Low" | "Medium" | "High", "est_monthly_savings_usd": number, "assumptions": string}
   - "bicep_snippet": a string containing an example Private Endpoint IaC snippet for the top candidate (should include the Microsoft.Network/privateEndpoints resource)

2) Write a client-facing summary to output/recommendations.md that includes the following sections (use headings):
   - Bandwidth Breakdown
   - Region Egress Heatmap
   - Optimization Opportunities
   - ROI Summary
   - Implementation Snippet
   In the Optimization Opportunities section, include at least one recommendation leveraging CDN or Front Door and at least one recommendation to migrate public PaaS traffic to Private Endpoints. In the ROI Summary, quantify estimated monthly savings in USD for each recommendation. Also include the statement: "CDN egress is typically 30-50% cheaper than direct Blob egress" and call out any assumptions you made.

Guidance:
- Categorize costs by type (inter-region, internet egress, Private Link vs public) and identify top-cost regions.
- Map potential CDN/Front Door offload for static assets and API caching, and Private Endpoint migration candidates for VM-to-PaaS and service-to-service flows seen in the topology.
- Use reasonable, explicit assumptions where the exports are ambiguous and list them in both files.
- Do not include credentials or secrets in any output.
- Keep all outputs within the output/ directory as specified above.
